backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining food health analysis types and a predefined dataset of 20+ foods with calories, sugar/fat levels, health scores, and status. Provides backend logic for food analysis, ingredient scanning, user profiles, and health warnings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (splash screen, home screen, camera, ingredient scanner, result screen, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of every frontend module.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FoodGuard AI React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all seven application routes (splash, home, camera, food-input, result, ingredient-scan, profile) with search param validation for the result route.
frontend/src/components/HealthScoreGauge: SVG circular gauge component rendering a 240-degree arc with color-coded progress (green/yellow/red) based on a 0–100 health score, displaying the numeric score and status label.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient. Exports `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for backend actor calls including food analysis, user profile CRUD, ingredient scanning, and health warnings. Uses `useActor` to access the canister actor and invalidates relevant queries on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Plus Jakarta Sans, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status colors, chart colors, and custom animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CameraScreen.tsx: Camera capture screen that accesses the device camera via `getUserMedia`, supports food and ingredient scan modes, and navigates to the appropriate input screen after capturing a photo.
frontend/src/pages/FoodInputScreen.tsx: Screen for manually entering a food name with autocomplete suggestions, which calls the backend `analyzeFood` actor method and navigates to the result screen on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomeScreen.tsx: Home/landing screen displaying the FoodGuard AI branding, feature highlights, and a primary CTA button that navigates to the camera scan screen.
A screen that lets users paste or type a food ingredient list, submits it to the backend via a mutation hook, and displays warning badges for detected harmful ingredients along with a count of harmful items.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileScreen.tsx: A screen for viewing and editing the user's health profile (age, weight, health conditions), loading existing data via a query hook and saving updates via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ResultScreen.tsx: A screen that displays the full health analysis for a scanned food item, including a health score gauge, nutrient level badges, health status, and personalized warnings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SplashScreen.tsx: An animated splash screen showing the FoodGuard AI logo, app name, and tagline that automatically navigates to the home screen after 2.2 seconds.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using OKLCH), border radii, shadows, keyframe animations, and font family for the FoodGuard AI app, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing FoodGuard AI's architecture, implemented features, image requirements, and known issues, used for build planning and feature tracking.
